\[

\[

\[

\[

\[

\[

\]

\[

\]

\[
x ^ {T} A x \leq \lambda_ {1} \cos^ {2} \left(\operatorname {d i s t} \left(x, x ^ {*}\right)\right) + \lambda_ {2} \sin^ {2} \left(\operatorname {d i s t} \left(x, x ^ {*}\right)\right).
\]

\[

\]

\[

\]

\[

\[

\[

\[

\]
